description: A color photograph of a hand holding up a printed postcard. The card has a distressed dark design with bold text reading BEWARE! YOUR NEIGHBOR IS AN ICE AGENT and IMMIGRATION ENFORCEMENT LIVES NEXT DOOR. It includes an ICE U.S. Immigration badge graphic on the left and a photograph of a masked figure in tactical gear marked ICE on the right.
notable_text: BEWARE! YOUR NEIGHBOR IS AN ICE AGENT; IMMIGRATION ENFORCEMENT; LIVES NEXT DOOR; ICE; U.S. IMMIGRATION
